Bot commands

All 75+ commands

Use the default prefix & for all commands. Search or filter by category below.

Moderation
Banning
&ban <@user> <reason>Ban a user from the server.mod
&unban <@user> <reason>Unban a user.mod
&tempban <@user> <time> <reason>Temporarily ban a user.mod
&softban <@user> <reason>Ban and immediately unban to purge messages.mod
&massban <@user1> <@user2> <reason>Ban multiple users at once.mod
&hackban <user_id> <reason>Ban a user who is not in the server.mod
Muting & Timeout
&mute <@user> <reason>Mute a user.mod
&unmute <@user> <reason>Unmute a user.mod
&timeout <@user> <time> <reason>Timeout a user.mod
&untimeout <@user> <reason>Remove a user's timeout.mod
&jail <@user> <reason>Jail a user.mod
&unjail <@user> <reason>Unjail a user.mod
Kicking
&kick <@user> <reason>Kick a user from the server.mod
Warnings
&warn <@user> <reason>Warn a user.mod
&warnings <@user>View a user's warnings.mod
&removewarn <id>Remove a specific warning.mod
&clearwarns <@user>Clear all warnings from a user.mod
&autopunishView autopunish settings.admin
&autopunish on/offEnable or disable automatic punishments.admin
&setwarnlimit <number>Set warning limit before punishment.admin
Channel Management
&lock <#channel>Lock a channel.mod
&unlock <#channel>Unlock a channel.mod
&lockallLock all channels in the server.mod
&unlockallUnlock all channels in the server.mod
&nuke <#channel>Delete all messages in a channel.mod
&hide <#channel>Hide a channel.mod
&unhide <#channel>Unhide a channel.mod
&hiddenView all hidden channels.mod
&slowmode <time> <#channel>Set slowmode for a channel.mod
Role Management
&role <@user> <@role>Assign a role to a user.mod
&roleall <@role> <reason>Assign a role to all members.admin
&roleremoveall <@role> <reason>Remove a role from all members.admin
Purge
&purge <amount>Delete a specific number of messages.mod
&purge <@user> <amount>Delete messages from a specific user.mod
&purge botsDelete all bot messages.mod
&purge userDelete messages from a user (interactive).mod
&purge attachmentsDelete all messages with attachments.mod
&purge allDelete all messages in the channel.mod
&purge <@user1> between <@user2>Delete messages between two users.mod
&purge <@user1> after <@user2>Delete messages from one user after another user's message.mod
Security
Core
&antinukeView antinuke status.admin
&antinuke enableActivate the security system.admin
&antinuke disableDeactivate the security system.admin
&antinuke configView and adjust current security settings.admin
&antinuke logs <#channel>Set the channel for antinuke alerts and logs.admin
Extra Owner
&extraowner add <@user>Add an extra owner to manage antinuke.owner
&extraowner remove <@user>Remove an extra owner.owner
Admin
&admin add <@user>Add an admin to the antinuke system.admin
&admin remove <@user>Remove an admin.admin
&admin listView all antinuke admins.admin
Whitelist
&wl add <@user>Whitelist a user to bypass security restrictions.admin
&wl remove <@user>Remove a user from the whitelist.admin
&wl listView all whitelisted users.admin
Utility
Bot
&botinfoView bot statistics and system status.all
&pingCheck the bot's current latency.all
Server
&serverinfoView detailed server information.all
&servericonDisplay the server's icon.all
&serverbannerDisplay the server's banner.all
&boostsView server boost information.all
&membercountCheck total member count.all
&statisticsView server statistics.all
&rolesList all roles in the server.all
User
&userinfo <@user>View detailed information about a user.all
&avatar <@user>Display a user's avatar.all
&banner <@user>Display a user's banner.all
&roleinfo <@role>View detailed information about a role.all
AFK
&afk <reason>Set your AFK status with a reason.all
Tickets
Setup
&ticket setupBegin the ticket system setup.admin
&ticket category <#category>Set the category for ticket channels.admin
&ticket role <@role>Set which role can manage tickets.admin
&ticket logs <#channel>Set the channel for ticket transcripts.admin
&ticket panelCreate the ticket panel for users.admin
User
&ticket openOpen a new ticket.all
&ticket close  &tcClose the current ticket.all
&ticket add <@user>Add a user to the ticket.mod
&ticket remove <@user>Remove a user from the ticket.mod
Staff
&ticket claim  &tcmClaim a ticket to show you're handling it.mod
&ticket transcript  &ttGet a transcript of the current ticket.mod
&ticket rename <name>Rename the ticket channel.mod
&ticket blacklist <@user>Prevent a user from opening tickets.mod
&ticket statsView ticket system statistics.mod
Config
&ticket mention <@role>Set which role gets mentioned when tickets open.admin
&ticket mention enableEnable role mentions for new tickets.admin
&ticket mention disableDisable role mentions for new tickets.admin
&ticket managerOpen the ticket management dashboard.admin
Welcome
&welcome enableActivate the welcome system.admin
&welcome disableDeactivate the welcome system.admin
&welcome setupStart the setup process for welcome messages.admin
&welcome configView current welcome configuration.admin
&welcome testTest your welcome message.admin
&welcome resetReset all welcome settings.admin
Join to Create
&jtc setupStart the setup process to configure join to create.admin
&jtc resetReset all join to create settings.admin
&jtc infoView current join to create configuration.admin
&jtc helpView help information for join to create.all
Reaction Roles
Setup
&rr setupBegin the setup process for a new reaction role panel.admin
&rr edit <message_id>Edit an existing reaction role panel.admin
&rr delete <message_id>Delete a reaction role panel.admin
&rr addrole <message_id> <@role> [label] [emoji] [style]Add a role to an existing panel.admin
&rr removerole <message_id> <@role>Remove a role from a panel.admin
&rr mode <message_id> <normal|single|verify>Change the mode of a panel.admin
&rr display <message_id> <buttons|dropdown>Change how roles are displayed.admin
Info
&rr listView all active reaction role panels.admin
&rr info <message_id>View detailed information about a specific panel.admin
